name: python3-libvsgpt
title: python3-libvsgpt
summary: library to access the GUID Partition Table volume system -- Python 3 bindings
description:
library to access the GUID Partition Table volume system -- Python 3 bindings
libvsgpt is a library to access the GUID Partition Table (GPT) volume system.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libvsgpt.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-libvsgpt because library to access the GUID Partition Table volume system -- Python 3 bindings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-libvsgpt as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-libvsgpt with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-libvsgpt --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
